blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 21 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,080 ft. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
